message:
fix(lab): prevent u16 overflow in HTTP harness status class filter

by_status_class(class) computed class * 100 which overflows u16 for
class >= 656, panicking in debug mode. Changed to saturating_mul/add.

Also applies rustfmt to database/pool.rs (drift from concurrent edits)
and records batch 413 audits: 5 files (~4K lines) including fs/path_ops,
codec/framed, codec/length_delimited, trace/geodesic — all SOUND.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
